meaning: n.(观看电视节目时以转换频道方式)跳过广告节目
examples: NEWS: Zapping the Brain Improves Math skills.
In my dream, a long-fingered witch was zapping me with heart attacks " Feel that?"
Information can be "written" to one ion by zapping it with a laser to change its state.
Now radiologists are touting radio-wave zapping as a viable fourth weapon against smaller tumors.
But when it comes, runaway drivers will get a zapping they will never forget.
